name: Lucius Mattheson
title: In Plain Sight

abilities.name: Entourage
abilities.text: After this model declares the Walk action, any number of other unengaged allies within 6" may move up to 2" in any direction.

abilities.name: U First to Speak
abilities.text: If this model has already activated this turn, enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: Mastermind
abilities.text: After the opponent selects a scheme, you may guess the name of the scheme and the opponent must answer yes or no. If correct, infuse a (soulstone).

actions.name: Subpoena
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may draw range and LoS from allies within 8" of this model.

triggers.name: Motion Carried
triggers.text: Place the target into base contact with the model from which range was drawn.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Drown in Paperwork
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5". This model may remove any one marker the target came into base contact with this way.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

actions.name: Executive Order
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target gains an Adaptable token and may declare an action.

triggers.name: Personal Dispensation
triggers.text: This model may declare the Prepare action.

extraction_notes: The Mastermind ability text appears to be cut off at the bottom of the visible card
